title: thymus balcanus subvar. arnautorum
intro: Thymus balcanus subvar. arnautorum, also known as Arnaut's thyme, is a subspecies of thyme, a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Balkan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arnaut's thyme include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Arnaut's thyme can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
